# gaugeColorLocations

**Instance Property**

The location of each color in a multicolor gauge’s gradient.

## Declaration

```swift
var gaugeColorLocations: [NSNumber]? { get }
```

## Discussion

This property specifies the location of each color in the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColors] array. Each location must be a value between `0.0` and `1.0`.

A gauge with more than one color appears as a gradient. The provider specifies the colors using the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColors] property. The [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColors] and [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKGaugeProvider/gaugeColorLocations] properties must have the same number of elements.

## Setting the Gauge’s Appearance

- **gaugeColors**: The colors of the gauge.
- **style**: The style that defines the gauge’s appearance.

items.description: The style that defines the gauge’s appearance.
